Interface IRESTResource

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.esriSystem
Assembly
ESRI.Server.System.dll

REST resource metadata object.

[Guid("B5561EA3-2950-4E21-9E4F-B1003B2A1BAF")]
[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
public interface IRESTResource

Properties

IsCollection

Specifies collection resource.

bool IsCollection { get; set; }

Property Value

bool

Examples

Sample Snippet

IsDefaultCollection

Specifies 'default' collection resource that can be accessed without explicitly using its name in the URL.

bool IsDefaultCollection { get; set; }

Property Value

bool

Examples

Sample Snippet

IsStatic

This flag marks resources that do not change over time.

bool IsStatic { get; set; }

Property Value

bool

Examples

Sample Snippet

Name

Resource name. Used in IRESTRequestHandler's schema generation and url parsing.

string Name { get; set; }

Property Value

string

Examples

Sample Snippet

RequiredCapability

Required capability for the resource.

string RequiredCapability { get; set; }

Property Value

string

Examples

Sample Snippet

SupportsETag

This flag is only for a root level resource. If this flag is true, IRRH implementation supports ETag.

bool SupportsETag { get; set; }

Property Value

bool

Sample Snippet
